qa_pairs.question: When will my sponsored role become active?
qa_pairs.answer: Your role should be activated as soon as your sponsor renews their account and confirms your role.

qa_pairs.question: What conditions must be met for my sponsored account to be activated?
qa_pairs.answer: Your account will only be activated once your sponsor confirms that your role is continuing AND renews their own account.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I have questions or need help with account activation?
qa_pairs.answer: If you have any questions or need help, please email renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: I made a mistake and renewed my account with the wrong role. What should I do to correct this and renew my account with the right role?
qa_pairs.answer: You should create a new role with your current information and update your account with the new role. Log into CCDB, go to 'My Account' in the main menu, and select 'Apply for a new role'. Follow the instructions and choose your new role.

qa_pairs.question: How can I apply for a new role if I've renewed my account incorrectly?
qa_pairs.answer: Log into CCDB and in the main menu, under 'My Account', go to 'Apply for a new role'. Follow the instructions and select your new role.

qa_pairs.question: What happens to my old role if I create a new one after renewing with the wrong role?
qa_pairs.answer: Your old role will automatically expire and be deactivated on the morning of June 11, 2025, if it is not renewed.

qa_pairs.question: How do I add multiple roles to my Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: If you want to have several roles, add a new role by going to https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/me/add_role and click on “disable old roles” on that page.

qa_pairs.question: Can I set multiple primary roles if I have several applications?
qa_pairs.answer: No, it is possible to submit several applications, but you can only set one of them as your primary role.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I'm trying to reactivate an old sponsored role but my sponsor cannot confirm it?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca so that we can assist you with your request.
